problem_statement:
Bug: `postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field` validation broken in v10.21.0

### Package version eg. v9, v10:

v10.22.0

### Issue, Question or Enhancement:

This PR (https://github.com/go-playground/validator/pull/1270) released with v10.21.0 broke `postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field` validations.

I believe this open PR (https://github.com/go-playground/validator/pull/1287) would fix it, but it has not been merged.

### Code sample, to showcase or reproduce:

    package main

    import (
        "fmt"
        "github.com/go-playground/validator/v10"
    )

    type Example struct {
        PostCode    string `validate:"required,postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field=CountryCode"`
        CountryCode string `validate:"required,iso3166_1_alpha2"`
    }

    func main() {
        validate := validator.New(validator.WithRequiredStructEnabled())
        ex := Example{CountryCode: "US", PostCode: "12345"}
        err := validate.Struct(ex)
        fmt.Println(err)
    }

Under v10.22.0, this outputs:
> Key: 'Example.PostCode' Error:Field validation for 'PostCode' failed on the 'postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field' tag

Under v10.20.0, the validation works as expected.
patch:
diff --git a/baked_in.go b/baked_in.go
index 2f66c1836..dab60f18f 100644
--- a/baked_in.go
+++ b/baked_in.go
@@ -1417,6 +1417,7 @@ func isPostcodeByIso3166Alpha2Field(fl FieldLevel) bool {
 		panic(fmt.Sprintf("Bad field type %T", currentField.Interface()))
 	}
 
+	postcodeRegexInit.Do(initPostcodes)
 	reg, found := postCodeRegexDict[currentField.String()]
 	if !found {
 		return false
test_patch:
diff --git a/zz_issue1314_repro_test.go b/zz_issue1314_repro_test.go
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/zz_issue1314_repro_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+package validator
+
+import "testing"
+
+// Reproduction for go-playground/validator issue #1314:
+// postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field validation was broken in v10.21.0 because the
+// postcode regexes were never lazily initialised. A valid US postcode should
+// pass; before the fix (PR #1359) it fails.
+func TestIssue1314PostcodeIso3166Alpha2Field(t *testing.T) {
+	type Example struct {
+		PostCode    string `validate:"required,postcode_iso3166_alpha2_field=CountryCode"`
+		CountryCode string `validate:"required,iso3166_1_alpha2"`
+	}
+
+	validate := New(WithRequiredStructEnabled())
+
+	ex := Example{CountryCode: "US", PostCode: "12345"}
+	if err := validate.Struct(ex); err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("expected valid US postcode to pass, got: %v", err)
+	}
+}
